title: croton wigginsii
intro: Croton wigginsii, also known as Wiggins' croton, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Mexico, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Croton wigginsii include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and even snake bites, due to its potent antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds. Herbal preparations of Croton wigginsii include teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
